name: pr_wl_time_revival
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:time(200ms); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: GRADUATED at D-183 (wl-ladder rung-3 time twin, GREEN engine==oracle 3x): [3, 2, 52] — the advance time-evicts v1 (eager re-fire, D-112), then an external update of the EVICTED event REVIVES it into the windowed accumulate ({50,2}=52). Pins that the landed window:time surface already implements revival in the pure-eviction shape (the D-137c2 clock_removed suppression scopes elsewhere; its pins stay green) — and that time and length windows AGREE on revival (the length twin wl_u2_upd_evicted).
